ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Continued To Jun-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Stacy Knox.

Ms. Callejo stated that they have a petition to determine heirs on calendar for June 3rd, that this is what's holding up final distribution, that they have the accounting ready, and raised the issue of the hearing being two weeks out, filing a status report and then having to amend it. Status on close of estate is continued to June 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Callejo that if she can not get this done on time, she is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution As To Intestate Portion Of Estate

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1312 Skyview Drive, Burlingame, Ca, San Mateo County, California)
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Stacy Knox.

The estate holds a 50% interest in the property. 100% of the property was sold. The sale was confirmed at $1,470,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). The proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into blocked accounts in lieu of bond. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts is set for January 14, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.
